content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_PackageTracking
-- drop view BI_PackageTracking
AS

SELECT MF.ITNO AS ITEM_NUMBER
      ,MT.POPN AS CUSTOMER_SKU
      ,MF.CUOR AS CUST_PO_NUMBER
      ,MF.DLIX AS DELIVERY_NUMBER
      ,MF.RIDN AS ORDER_NUMBER
      ,MF.PANR AS PACKAGE_NUMBER
      ,MF.DLQT AS SHIPPED_QUANTITY
      ,MF.GRWE AS PACKAGE_WEIGHT
      ,MP.DLRM AS CARRIER
      ,MP.ETRN AS TRACKING_NUMBER
      ,MF.RGDT AS ENTRY_DATE
      ,MP.CUNO AS CUSTOMER_NUMBER
      ,MP.PACO AS PACKAGE_LEVEL
FROM M3.MFTRNS MF
    LEFT JOIN M3.MPTRNS MP ON MF.PANR = MP.SSCC AND MF.DLIX = MP.DLIX AND (MP.PACO = 0 OR MP.PACO IS NULL OR MP.PACO IS NULL)
    LEFT JOIN M3.MITPOP MT ON MF.ITNO = MT.ITNO AND MT.E0PA = MP.CUNO AND ALWT = '6'
    LEFT JOIN M3.MHDISH MH ON MF.DLIX = MH.DLIX
WHERE MH.PGRS = 90 AND MH.RORC = 3
